title: DTU RAVEN Holds First General Assembly and Secures Funding
excerpt: DTU RAVEN held its first General Assembly at DTU Skylab and secured 150,000 DKK in funding.
content:
A New Chapter for Our Organization! We are thrilled to announce that we have officially held our first General Assembly at DTU Skylab's fantastic facilities — a defining moment that solidifies us as an organization ready to make our mark on the world of autonomous systems.

This milestone comes with great responsibility: thanks to the generous 150,000 DKK in funding from DTU - Technical University of Denmark, we are fully committed to driving our mission forward with focus, efficiency, and a clear vision for the future.

At the assembly, we proudly elected our first board, who will steer our organization toward success:
- Markus Rytter - President
- Carl Borg - Treasurer and Vice President
- Sander Busch
- Anders Skovborg
- Søren Skovborg

This is only the beginning! With our sights set on groundbreaking advancements in autonomous systems, we can’t wait to show the world what passion, innovation, and teamwork can achieve.
